AR1.justification: The entry was routed into decisions.md as an accepted ADR despite no team alignment, no constraints, and no consequences — exactly the not-yet-a-commitment shape the methodology's strict bar and the 'when uncertain, default to today's daybook Log' instruction route away from decisions.md.

AR2.justification: n/a — this is an artifact-routing scenario, not a runbook/procedure scenario, so artifact-binding doesn't apply.

AR3.justification: Cross-references use the prescribed relative-path + ISO-dated anchor convention (decisions.md#2026-05-17-postgres-for-the-events-service, daybook/2026-05-17.md) and both resolve cleanly.

AR4.justification: Both writes are append-only with dated headings; re-running would append a new dated entry rather than mutating the existing one, keeping history coherent.
